Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.key

Class QuantifiedLiteralKey

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.key.SymbolKey<QuantifiedDescriptor>
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.key.QuantifiedLiteralKey
public class QuantifiedLiteralKey extends SymbolKey<QuantifiedDescriptor>
This class represents an entry for a quantified predicate of the form {∀,∃}x,y,z·Lstu, where x,y,z are variables and s,t,u are terms. It serves as a key in the quantified predicate symbol table. If two QuantifiedLiteralKey are equal, they refer to the same quantified descriptor in the table.

Quantified literals are uniquely identified by the formula that they range over and the defining terms inside this formula. Defining terms are terms where all unquantifed variables are replaced by a VariableHolder as given by method TermSignature.getUnquantifiedTerm(int, int, List).
